subcodes.first_line: Verily, We have heard the call of Our servants and handmaidens from every direction. Blessed is the maidservant who hath turned and said: "I believe in Thee, O..." [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انا سمعنا ندآء عبادی و امائی من کل الاشطار طوبی لامه اقبلت و قالت آمنت بک یا
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @station of the Manifestation of God, @transcendence; unknowability of God
